# Guildframe

> Shopify store design and development for tabletop games, plus a premium DIY Shopify theme.

Guildframe helps board game, card game, TTRPG, miniatures and tabletop studios build Shopify stores designed around their products and worlds.

## Primary offerings

- Done for you Shopify store: A complete store designed and developed from zero to publish for a flat $2,500 fee, including up to 50 product SKUs.
- Guildframe theme: A fully customizable tabletop Shopify theme for $349 with four presets and Shopify visual editor controls.
- Care Plan: Ongoing store updates, small adjustments and one campaign or product launch page each month for $99 per month after a Guildframe store build.
- Free preview: A tailored Shopify store direction created within 72 hours at no cost for creators with final artwork and products ready to sell.

## Guildframe theme presets

- Rune Single: Cinematic storefront for one flagship game.
- Rune Studio: Cinematic storefront for a small studio catalog.
- Saga Single: Playful storefront for one flagship game.
- Saga Studio: Playful storefront for a small studio catalog.
